title: HTML Text Extractor & Cleaner
description: Paste any raw HTML and get back clean, structured text — title, headings, paragraphs, links, images, word count, and reading time.

html.title: Raw HTML
html.description: Paste the full HTML content you want to extract text from. This is the only required field.
html.prefill:
Welcome to the Sample Page

About this tool

This Actor extracts clean, structured text from any raw HTML you provide.

It returns the title, headings, paragraphs, links, images, word count and estimated reading time.

Features

No web scraping involved. You supply the HTML, the Actor does the rest.

Visit ApifyRead the Docs

extractHeadings.title: Extract Headings
extractHeadings.description: When enabled, all H1–H6 headings are extracted and returned with their level (H1, H2, etc.) and text.

extractLinks.title: Extract Links
extractLinks.description: When enabled, all anchor tags with href attributes are extracted (duplicates removed). Fragment-only and javascript: links are skipped.

extractImages.title: Extract Images
extractImages.description: When enabled, all img tags are extracted with their src and alt attributes.

cleanWhitespace.title: Clean Whitespace
cleanWhitespace.description: When enabled, extra spaces, tabs, and excessive blank lines are removed from the extracted body text.

minWordLength.title: Minimum Word Length (for word count)
minWordLength.description: Words shorter than this value are excluded from the word count. Set to 1 to count all words.
